body.title: uucompactclaude: PostCompact hook to reliably restore Sonnet
body.intention: I intend that /model sonnet fires only after compaction actually completes, not after a blind 30s sleep.
body.description:
uucompactclaude currently fires `/model sonnet` after `sleep 30`, which is a timing heuristic — compaction may take longer, leaving the session on Haiku until the next /model command.

Two improvements:
1. **PostCompact hook** in CLAUDE.md (Claude Code supports hooks that fire on /compact completion) that runs `/model sonnet` — eliminates the race entirely.
2. **Slate path in preserve string** — change `/compact preserve: /context-load - then resume` to include the explicit slate path so post-compact CC knows where to look without guessing.

Current preserve string: `preserve: /context-load - then resume`
Target: `preserve: Read today's slate at ${IGOR_HOME}/claudecode/YYYYMMDD.slate.txt. In-flight and Next: see slate.`

**Affected files:** lab/claudecode/uucompactclaude, .claude/settings.json (or CLAUDE.md for hook config)
**Design rules:** none
**Scope boundary:** IN — PostCompact hook + slate path in preserve string. OUT — changing the Haiku-dance model sequence.
**Completion criteria:** After /compact, session automatically returns to Sonnet without a fixed sleep; preserve string includes the concrete slate path.
